---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for CV-Toposheet
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: adityaakashbhu23-svg
---

**What feature would you like?**
A clear description of the feature or improvement you are suggesting.

**Which part of the app does it relate to?**
- [ ] Map upload / supported formats
- [ ] OCR accuracy
- [ ] LLM cleaning / post-processing
- [ ] Grid / coordinate detection
- [ ] Search and filtering
- [ ] Export (CSV, JSON, etc.)
- [ ] User interface
- [ ] New map type / country support
- [ ] Performance / speed
- [ ] Other

**Why would this be useful?**
Explain your use case — what research problem would this help solve?

**Any examples or references?**
Links, screenshots, or examples of similar tools that do this well.

**Additional context**
Any other information that might help.
